reviews.review_description: This is a great application that truly supports the educational process in a meaningful way. It offers an interactive learning experience that makes it easier to understand complex topics through engaging and immersive content. Using Virtual Reality adds a new dimension to how information is delivered and absorbed, especially in subjects that benefit from visualization and hands-on interaction.
Can’t really use this app because it is all in Arabic. No mention of this on store page.

developer_response.body:
Hello
thank you for being interrested in our app
English is available and you can switch to English from the upper right or left of the welcome screen

reviews.review_description:
Amazing Platform for VR Educational 
I have been testing a lot of Virtual Reality for education and this TeknoVerse is one of my best platform that i have been tested. I really recommend you to try this platform out, you'll certainly be a big fun to it!
